metadata.description: 0 to 1 Labs Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: codex-pr-review
plugins.description: Review a pull request using a dual-family pipeline (OpenAI Codex + Claude Opus) with a cross-family grounded verifier and a deterministic lint/typecheck/test floor.

plugins.name: claude-code-prompt-optimizer
plugins.description: Wrap a prompt in <optimize>...</optimize> and it is rewritten into a sharper prompt before it runs (Claude Opus 4.8). Hook-based.

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Expanded, anti-AI-slop fork of the stock frontend-design skill — distinctive, production-grade UI with sharper triggering, richer typographic/aesthetic direction, font-loading mechanics, a workflow, and a hard accessibility/responsive quality floor.

plugins.name: nanobanana
plugins.description: Generate and edit photorealistic images with perfect text rendering using Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image). Auto-enhances prompts and supports aspect ratio, resolution, and reference-image editing.

plugins.name: iac-diagram-generator
plugins.description: Analyzes Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation, Kubernetes, Docker Compose) and generates professional cloud architecture diagrams with Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image).
